name: Calculateur Ppcm Pgcd
desc: Calculez GCD via Euclidean algorithm; LCM = (a×b)/GCD(a,b). Exemple: GCD(48, 18) = GCD = 6; LCM = 144. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
description: Calculez GCD via Euclidean algorithm; LCM = (a×b)/GCD(a,b). Exemple: GCD(48, 18) = GCD = 6; LCM = 144. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
seo_description: Calculez GCD via Euclidean algorithm; LCM = (a×b)/GCD(a,b). Exemple: GCD(48, 18) = GCD = 6; LCM = 144. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.
example_label: Find LCM and GCD of and for fraction operations or scheduling problems

range_hints.num1: Positive integers only; typical: 1-10,000 for practical use
range_hints.num2: Positive integers only; same range as num1

result_context: The mcm ({mcm}) is the smallest number divisible by both inputs; mcd ({mcd}) is the largest number that divides both inputs evenly.
formula_display: GCD: Euclidean algorithm | LCM = (num1 × num2) ÷ GCD
mistakes: Using decimal numbers instead of integers for GCD/LCM
Confusing which is larger (LCM ≥ both numbers, GCD ≤ both numbers)
Forgetting that GCD is needed to calculete LCM efficiently
